name: io.github.edithatogo/mchs
title: MCHS NWAU Calculator
description: Stdio MCP server for MCHS schemas, validation, support status, and evidence.

supportScope.formulaLogicPolicy: The MCP server delegates to the canonical runtime and does not duplicate calculator formula logic.

security.dataHandling: Local process; no telemetry or external submission by the server.
security.healthcareCaveat: Private or restricted healthcare deployments should use an internal registry or catalog.

knownLimitations: Official MCP Registry submission requires mcp-publisher authentication.
Smithery submission is deferred until Streamable HTTP or MCPB packaging exists.
Docker MCP Registry submission is deferred because the first release is not containerized.
